incentive.statement: Close the adjudicated Lessons 24-26 failure inventory through Canvas-authorized typed grammar, application, and UI paths without surface-string authority or a second runtime lane.

coordinator.responsibility: Keep every repair tied to a confirmed Canvas decision and coordinate the grammar, application, UI, and verification responsibilities through one handoff.

outcome: All adjudicated failures use canonical typed stems and layers, Canvas-only participant decisions are eligible only in their licensed environments, and the regular suite plus readiness return green.

responsibilities.statement: Own canonical source identity, hidden nonactive bases, quantity, variants, recursive applicatives, source voice, participant depth, and later passive composition.

actors.contribution: Represent every confirmed relation and notation/formula distinction as typed grammar data and operations.

responsibilities.statement: Project the selected typed route through application controls and results while deriving causative object kind from source voice and rejecting stale or forged choices.

actors.contribution: Preserve canonical choice identity and expose only Canvas-licensed pending decisions.

responsibilities.statement: Remove the independent causative object-kind selector, retain conditional referent and shuntline questions, and clear ineligible values before requests cross the application boundary.

actors.contribution: Make the visible decision inventory match Canvas English and prevent hidden state from authorizing grammar.

responsibilities.statement: Replace stale surface and event-listener expectations with hostile typed checks, then run focused suites, alignment, the regular suite, and readiness.

actors.contribution: Prove exact Canvas notation, formula realization, choice eligibility, application continuity, and runtime integrity.

responsibilities.statement: Keep the target, board, shared-action state, and alignment evidence current through closure.

actors.contribution: Record the adjudicated closure and prevent the resolved failure ledger from remaining an active decision gate.

retirements.removalEvidence: Exact Canvas choices and typed citation roles replace target-surface overlays; catalog results remain evidence-only.
The selector is absent and causative participant kind is derived from the canonical source voice and participant transform.
Only a matching prior typed control frame can carry a visible eligible choice; the application request blanks ineligible relation and shuntline values.
Canonical notation retains long derivational vowels while tense-bearing formulaic notation uses the Lesson 7 allomorph.

evidence.result: All affected documentation, source-class, source-voice, complete-example, relation-UI, application, finite-surface, Lessons 20-22, Lessons 24-26, and general UI suites pass their focused reruns.
The integrated readiness run passed the exact regular inventory at 3496/3496 assertions across 69 suites.

Runtime manifest passed with one browser entry and 74/74 modules/installers; alignment passed at every stabilization baseline; grammar data validation passed for 21 JSON files and the CSV inventories.
Lesson 20 passed 84/84 Canvas examples plus all focused visual, optional, productive, unlisted, lattice, and later-evidence checks; Lessons 20-22 passed all 39 formula cases with zero mismatches.

The recorded run stopped after the Lessons 20-22 responsibility. The Lessons 24-26 complete-example, witness/productive, Lesson 26, Karttunen, and browser-delivery responsibilities were not executed; focused evidence does not substitute for them, so the run is not a completed readiness result.

The flat serial chain is replaced by eleven atomic content-addressed stages. Exact-input proofs are reusable across interruption, changed owning inputs invalidate only their stages, independent misses run with bounded concurrency, and alignment plus browser delivery remain fresh-only.

closure.nextLessonEntryPoint: The adjudicated decision queue is closed; select a new explicit implementation target.
